title: Add requireUser guard to cekExistingTunkin Probe action
description: src/app/dashboard/action.ts cekExistingTunkin is a 'use server' Server Action (public RPC) with no requireUser() call. It relies solely on apiFetch's token refresh. CONTEXT.md invariant: 'auth invariants live in actions/DAL' and 'auth inside every action'. If the session expires mid-probe, the redirect happens from inside the action and leaves the upload hook in an ambiguous state.
acceptance_criteria: cekExistingTunkin calls requireUser() before apiFetch; unauthenticated callers are redirected to /login as with other guarded actions; happy-path Probe still works in the upload flow.

title: Bangun DAL: ensureFreshToken (di api.ts) + requireUser (lib/dal.ts)
description:
Implementasi logika refresh-on-demand dan helper auth untuk server component/action.

DESAIN:
- ensureFreshToken DIPINDAH ke src/lib/api.ts (bukan dal.ts) untuk menghindari import cycle dengan apiFetch.
- requireUser ditaruh di src/lib/dal.ts (modul khusus auth-untuk-page).

LANGKAH:
1. Gunakan context7 -> '/vercel/next.js' query 'data access layer pattern auth redirect'.
2. Di src/lib/api.ts, implementasi ensureFreshToken(): currentSession(); jika tidak ada refreshToken -> signOut + redirect('/login'); jika isExpired false -> return accessToken; jika expired -> rawFetch<LoginToken>('/refresh', POST, body { token: refreshToken }), writeTokens(hasil), return access_token baru; jika rawFetch melempar -> signOut + redirect('/login').
3. Buat src/lib/dal.ts dengan 'server-only'. Ekspor requireUser(): Promise<JwtUserToken> -- ambil currentSession, jika user null atau refreshToken kosong -> redirect('/login'); else return user.
4. Hapus stub ensureFreshToken di api.ts (issue bd-e0w-2) -- ganti dengan implementasi nyata.

ACCEPTANCE:
- ensureFreshToken hidup di lib/api.ts dengan logika refresh + redirect on failure
- lib/dal.ts ekspor requireUser
- Tidak ada caller yang diubah di issue ini
acceptance_criteria: api.ts.ensureFreshToken implemented; dal.ts.requireUser implemented; lint hijau
notes: Implemented ensureFreshToken in lib/api.ts with real refresh logic and redirect on failure. Created lib/dal.ts with requireUser helper. Both modules are server-only. Verified with lint.

title: Rewrite lib/session.ts: cookie I/O + JWT decode (sync, no network)
description:
Ganti modul session yang sekarang penuh pass-through dangkal menjadi satu interface dalam: currentSession() yang mengembalikan struct Session lengkap.

KONTEKS:
- Cookie httpOnly: access_token, refresh_token (jangan diubah namanya).
- JWT type: src/tipes/auth.ts (JwtUserToken = sub, exp, iat, type, name, email, role).
- exp dalam detik epoch (kalikan 1000 untuk ms).
- Modul server-only.

LANGKAH:
1. Gunakan context7 -> '/vercel/next.js' query 'cookies() server only next 16'.
2. Definisikan tipe Session = { accessToken, refreshToken, user: JwtUserToken | null, expiresAt: number, isExpired: boolean }.
3. Implementasi currentSession(): baca dua cookie via next/headers cookies(), decode access_token (base64 payload, no signature verify -- aman karena httpOnly), hitung expiresAt = exp*1000, isExpired = Date.now() >= expiresAt - 5_000 (buffer 5 detik). Jika token kosong: kembalikan struct dengan string kosong, user null, expiresAt 0, isExpired true.
4. Implementasi signIn(token: LoginToken): tulis access_token + refresh_token cookie. Atur expiry cookie dari exp JWT (multiply by 1000).
5. Implementasi signOut(): hapus dua cookie.
6. Ekspor writeTokens(token: LoginToken) -- alias untuk dipakai DAL saat refresh (rewrite cookie). Boleh sama dengan signIn jika logikanya identik.
7. HAPUS ekspor lama yang dangkal: getAccessToken, getUser, getExpToken, setCookies, refreshSession, decodeToken, getSession. JANGAN migrasi caller di issue ini -- akan ada caller-migration issue.

ACCEPTANCE:
- src/lib/session.ts hanya ekspor: Session (type), currentSession, signIn, signOut, writeTokens
- Lint hijau (tetapi build mungkin merah karena caller belum dimigrasi -- itu OK, ditutup issue migrasi)
- Tidak ada panggilan fetch() di file ini
acceptance_criteria: session.ts hanya berisi cookie+decode; no fetch; lint hijau
notes: Rewrote lib/session.ts to handle cookie I/O and JWT decoding synchronously. Implemented currentSession, signIn, signOut, and writeTokens. Removed legacy shallow exports. Verified with lint (build expected to be red until caller migration).

title: Bangun modul HTTP dalam: lib/api.ts (rawFetch + apiFetch + ApiError)
description:
Bangun satu modul HTTP yang menyembunyikan baseUrl, bearer token, serialisasi body, dan unwrap BaseResponse<T>. Interface kecil, leverage tinggi (semua server action akan pakai ini).

KONTEKS:
- Backend membungkus respons dalam BaseResponse<T> = { status, data, message, errors?, ... } (lihat src/tipes/commons.ts).
- baseUrl di appConfig.apiUrl (src/lib/utils.ts).
- Modul ini server-only.

LANGKAH:
1. Gunakan context7 -> '/vercel/next.js' query 'server actions fetch authorization header pattern'.
2. Buat src/lib/api.ts dengan 'server-only' import.
3. Ekspor class ApiError(status, body, message).
4. Ekspor rawFetch<T>(path, init?) -- TANPA token. Tugasnya: prepend baseUrl, parse JSON, lempar ApiError saat !res.ok, return parsed.data dari BaseResponse<T>. Dipakai endpoint pra-login (/token, /refresh).
5. Ekspor apiFetch<T>(path, init?) -- DENGAN token. Tugas: panggil ensureFreshToken() (akan dibuat di issue DAL), set header Authorization Bearer, deteksi body: FormData biarkan apa adanya, object plain di-JSON.stringify + set Content-Type application/json, lalu delegasi ke rawFetch.
6. ensureFreshToken akan diimpor dari './api' SENDIRI (kita pindahkan ke api.ts untuk hindari cycle dengan dal.ts) -- TAPI implementasinya ditulis di issue DAL setelah session siap. Untuk sementara: definisikan signature stub yang melempar 'not implemented' supaya file kompilasi.

ACCEPTANCE:
- src/lib/api.ts ada, lint hijau, build hijau
- Tidak ada konsumen yang dipindah dulu (itu issue tersendiri)
- Tipe generik T diteruskan dengan benar
acceptance_criteria: lib/api.ts exports rawFetch, apiFetch, ApiError; build hijau
notes: Implemented lib/api.ts with ApiError, rawFetch, and apiFetch. Added server-only import. rawFetch handles baseUrl and BaseResponse unwrap. apiFetch handles Bearer token (via stub ensureFreshToken) and automatic JSON serialization. All verified with lint and build.

title: Upgrade Next.js 16.0.10 -> 16.2.2 (+ best practices)
description:
Naikkan Next.js ke versi 16.2.2 dan baca rilis-note untuk best practice baru (DAL pattern, optimistic middleware/proxy, Server Action conventions).

LANGKAH:
1. Gunakan context7 -> resolve '/vercel/next.js' lalu query: 'next 16 upgrade notes', 'data access layer pattern', 'middleware best practices auth'. Catat rekomendasi.
2. Update dependency: bun add next@16.2.2 eslint-config-next@16.2.2 (jika ada). Bun adalah package manager (lihat bun.lock).
3. Jalankan: bun run lint && bun run build. Pastikan hijau.
4. Tidak ada perubahan logika di issue ini. Jika ada breaking change yang relevan untuk proxy/server-action, catat di NOTES issue ini -- TIDAK boleh diperbaiki di sini (dilakukan issue berikutnya).

ACCEPTANCE:
- package.json menunjukkan next@16.2.2
- bun run build sukses tanpa warning baru
- Catatan migrasi tertulis di bd notes
acceptance_criteria: next@16.2.2 terpasang; build hijau; catatan migrasi tersimpan
notes: Next.js upgraded to 16.2.2. Verified build and lint. src/proxy.ts updated to use named export 'proxy' as per Next 16 conventions. Confirmed proxy runs in nodejs runtime by default.

title: Deepen upload + Probe flow into a single useUploadTunkin hook
description: The Upload policy (validate → Probe cekExistingTunkin → window.confirm → doUpload → invalidate query) is smeared across src/hooks/upload-hook.ts, src/app/dashboard/action.ts (doUpload error reshaping), and src/components/form/form-dialog.tsx. Bugs about when to invalidate or how to surface overwrite live in three files.
acceptance_criteria: useUploadTunkin hook has zero imports from @tanstack/react-query, next/navigation, react-hook-form, or @hookform/resolvers; submit returns the discriminated UploadResult; phase transitions through idle→probing→(confirming)→uploading→done|error; <UploadTunkinDialog> wrapper owns form + AlertDialog + cache invalidation; window.confirm removed; doUpload action has no try/catch reshaping (depends on q7s); cekExistingTunkin has requireUser (depends on 2p1); overwrite-confirm path works end-to-end with controlled dialog.

title: Move fetchTunkin read out of Server Action into RSC
description: src/app/dashboard/action.ts exposes fetchTunkin as a Server Action that only marshals URLSearchParams and calls apiFetch — a pass-through. Per CONTEXT.md, reads belong in RSC; exposing them as actions creates a public RPC endpoint with no auth/transform value.
design:
Opsi 1: RSC murni + Opsi P2: useTransition isPending via React Context.

Struktur:
  page.tsx (RSC async) → <DashboardFilterProvider> (client) → {Filter, TunkinComponent}

Perubahan:
1. page.tsx: Promise.all([apiFetch orgs, apiFetch tunkin list]). Tunkin path = `/tunkin/${periode}?${search}` (sama persis dengan fetchTunkin sekarang). Hapus Suspense lama, ganti dengan loading.tsx route segment kalau perlu.
2. New: src/app/dashboard/filter-provider.tsx — "use client" context provider, owns useTunkinFilter(). Throws kalau dipakai di luar provider.
3. use-tunkin-filter.ts: tambah useTransition, wrap replaceUrl invocation di startTransition; expose isPending. Debounce 400ms tetap.
4. component.tsx: hapus useQuery, useTunkinData hook, currentView, isSwapping, PRESENCE_EXIT_MS, useEffect crossfade. Terima data: PageResponse<Tunkin> sebagai prop. Pakai useFilterContext() untuk ambil isPending → overlay (opacity-60 pointer-events-none) saat pending.
5. filter.tsx: switch ke useFilterContext() (share instance).
6. upload-hook.ts wrapper (UploadTunkinDialog di pkn): qc.invalidateQueries → router.refresh(). Hook itself tetap cache-agnostic.
7. action.ts: hapus fetchTunkin.

Kenapa Context bukan lifted wrapper: page tetap RSC (bisa await fetch server-side). Lifted wrapper memaksa "use client" naik ke shell. Context = satu provider client kecil di antara RSC dan client children.

TanStack QueryClient + provider tetap dipakai (cekExistingTunkin masih useMutation di pkn).
acceptance_criteria: fetchTunkin dihapus dari src/app/dashboard/action.ts; tidak ada client component import fetchTunkin; dashboard page fetch tunkin list via apiFetch di RSC; filter change pakai startTransition; tabel tidak unmount saat refetch (data lama tetap visible dengan overlay opacity); useQuery untuk list tunkin dihapus; presence-managed mount/unmount state (currentView/isSwapping) dihapus; upload sukses → router.refresh() bukan invalidateQueries.

title: [#3.4] Refactor OrganizationList: terima prop orgs, hapus useQuery
description:
Bagian 4/5. Hentikan client fetch di OrganizationList. Terima 'orgs' dari prop. Pertahankan CommandDialog + search-text (requirement).

WHY: useQuery di komponen ini = client roundtrip yang tidak perlu setelah RSC fetch tersedia. Search-text via CommandInput TETAP. Combobox shadcn tidak dipilih karena tidak support search text yang sama.

FILES:
- src/components/form/organization-list.tsx

STEPS:
1. Konsultasi context7 untuk pola controlled value + defaultValue di komponen react custom (sinkronisasi prop eksternal dengan state internal) — pastikan pattern yang dipakai stabil di React 19.
2. Tambahkan prop 'orgs: OrganizationMini[]' di OrganizationProps.
3. Hapus import 'fetchOrganization' + 'useQuery'.
4. Hapus 'useQuery' block (queryKey, queryFn, staleTime, gcTime, retry, refetch, isLoading, isFetching, queryError).
5. Hapus 'LoadingSkeleton' component dan semua usage-nya.
6. Sederhanakan 'EmptyState' — hilangkan branch 'queryError' dan retry button.
7. Ganti 'data' dengan 'orgs' di logic filter (filteredData, selectedOrg, dst).
8. Pertahankan: CommandDialog, CommandInput (search), filter via searchQuery, defaultValue → selectedValue sync useEffect, handleSelect, displayPlaceholder.
9. Update 'displayPlaceholder' — hilangkan branch isLoading/queryError. Hanya: kalau orgs.length === 0 → 'No organizations available', else placeholder default.
10. Update custom memo comparator — hapus dependency yang sudah tidak ada.
11. Cek dua callsite: dashboard filter (defaultValue=orgId dari URL) dan form upload (controlled via react-hook-form).
12. Manual test: a) buka dashboard, pilih org dari filter, verify URL update + autoselect bertahan saat refresh; b) buka dialog upload, pilih org, submit.
acceptance_criteria: OrganizationList tidak lagi fetch sendiri. Prop 'orgs' jadi source. Search text + autoselect dari defaultValue tetap berfungsi di dua callsite.
notes: Depends on #3.2 dan #3.3. Ini perubahan terbesar — junior dev harus konsultasi context7 dulu.

title: [#3.5] Hapus fetchOrganization action + cleanup + lint
description:
Bagian 5/5. Bersihkan action pass-through yang sudah tidak terpakai.

WHY: Setelah #3.4, tidak ada caller dari fetchOrganization. Action = pass-through alias yang gagal deletion test (kompleksitas hilang saat dihapus).

FILES:
- src/action/server/organization.ts (delete)
- src/action/server/ (delete kalau kosong)

STEPS:
1. Verifikasi tidak ada caller tersisa: 'grep -rn fetchOrganization src/' → harus zero hit (kecuali file yang akan dihapus).
2. Hapus src/action/server/organization.ts.
3. Cek apakah src/action/server/ kosong: 'ls src/action/server/'. Kalau kosong, hapus directory + parent (src/action/) kalau parent juga kosong.
4. Jalankan 'bun run lint' → wajib hijau.
5. Jalankan 'bun run build' → wajib sukses.
6. Update graphify: 'graphify update .'.
7. Commit dengan pesan: 'refactor(orgs): retire fetchOrganization pass-through action, fetch via RSC'.
acceptance_criteria: fetchOrganization terhapus. Zero caller tersisa. Lint + build hijau. graphify-out/ ter-update.
notes: Depends on #3.4. Last step before commit + push.

title: [#3.3] Prop-drill orgs: TunkinComponent → TunkinFormDialog → OrganizationList
description:
Bagian 3/5. Terima prop 'orgs' dari dashboard page, teruskan ke OrganizationList di dalam form upload.

WHY: TunkinFormDialog adalah callsite kedua OrganizationList. Dua callsite sumber data sama → konsumsi dari prop yang sama.

FILES:
- src/app/dashboard/component.tsx (TunkinComponent)
- src/app/dashboard/form-dialog.tsx (TunkinFormDialog) — verifikasi path tepat

STEPS:
1. Konsultasi context7 untuk pola membungkus client component dengan server component yang menyediakan data awal.
2. Tambahkan prop 'orgs: OrganizationMini[]' di TunkinComponent.
3. TunkinComponent meneruskan 'orgs' ke <TunkinFormDialog orgs={orgs} />.
4. TunkinFormDialog meneruskan 'orgs' ke <OrganizationList orgs={orgs} ... /> di dalam form-nya.
5. Belum ubah OrganizationList — issue #3.4.
acceptance_criteria: TunkinComponent + TunkinFormDialog menerima dan meneruskan prop 'orgs'.
notes: Depends on #3.1. Independent dari #3.2 (jalur prop terpisah).

title: [#3.2] Prop-drill orgs: TunkinFilterComponent → FilterFields → OrganizationList
description:
Bagian 2/5. Terima prop 'orgs' dari dashboard page, teruskan ke OrganizationList yang dipakai sebagai filter orgId.

WHY: Sumber data tunggal (RSC) → komponen client tidak fetch sendiri.

FILES:
- src/app/dashboard/filter.tsx (TunkinFilterComponent)
- src/components/dashboard/filter-fields.tsx (FilterFields)

STEPS:
1. Konsultasi context7 (Next.js + React 19) untuk pola passing data dari Server Component ke Client Component melalui beberapa layer.
2. Tambahkan prop 'orgs: OrganizationMini[]' di TunkinFilterComponent.
3. Forward ke <FilterFields orgs={orgs} ... />.
4. Tambahkan prop 'orgs' di FilterFields, forward ke <OrganizationList orgs={orgs} ... />.
5. Belum ubah OrganizationList — itu issue #3.4. Untuk sekarang TypeScript akan error di OrganizationList; itu OK, akan terselesaikan di #3.4.

NOTE: Filter orgId tetap autoselect via 'defaultValue={orgId}' dari URL params (sudah berfungsi sekarang). Tidak ada perubahan UX.
acceptance_criteria: TunkinFilterComponent + FilterFields menerima dan meneruskan prop 'orgs'. Type signature update.

title: [#3.1] Fetch orgs server-side di dashboard page (RSC)
description:
Bagian 1/5 retire pass-through action 'fetchOrganization'. Fetch OrganizationMini[] di RSC dashboard page, hentikan client useQuery untuk read static-ish ini.

WHY: Server Actions di Next 16 = public RPC endpoint untuk mutasi. Pure read seperti 'list organisasi' lebih tepat di RSC (auth-gated otomatis, no client roundtrip ekstra).

FILES:
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx (modify — sudah async)

STEPS:
1. Konsultasi context7 untuk pola fetch RSC + pass props ke client component di Next.js 16.
   - Library: /vercel/next.js
   - Query topik: 'async server component fetch data pass props to client component'
2. Di dashboard/page.tsx, panggil apiFetch<OrganizationMini[]>('/organization/list') sebelum return JSX.
3. Import OrganizationMini dari '@/tipes/organization'.
4. Pass hasil sebagai prop 'orgs' ke <TunkinFilterComponent orgs={orgs} /> dan <TunkinComponent orgs={orgs} />.
5. Jangan ubah signature komponen anak dulu — itu issue terpisah (#3.2 dan #3.3).
6. Jalankan 'bun run build' untuk verifikasi server fetch jalan.

NOTE: Auth sudah dijamin oleh proxy + apiFetch (ensureFreshToken auto-redirect kalau expired).
acceptance_criteria: dashboard/page.tsx fetch orgs server-side via apiFetch. Build sukses. orgs di-pass ke TunkinFilterComponent dan TunkinComponent.
notes: Patuhi CONTEXT.md §Data flow conventions. Patuhi context7-required label.

title: Verifikasi akhir: lint + build + smoke test manual
description:
Gerbang kualitas terakhir sebelum tutup epic.

LANGKAH:
1. bun run lint -- harus hijau, tidak boleh ada warning baru dibanding baseline.
2. bun run build -- standalone build harus sukses.
3. Smoke test manual (bun dev):
   a. /login dengan kredensial valid -> redirect ke /dashboard.
   b. /login dengan kredensial salah -> error message muncul, tidak crash.
   c. /dashboard tanpa cookie -> redirect /login.
   d. Filter dashboard (periode, search) -> URL berubah, data refetch.
   e. Upload xlsx baru -> dialog konfirmasi (jika periode sudah ada) -> upload sukses -> tabel refetch.
   f. Tunggu access_token expired (atau hapus cookie access_token manual via devtools, sisakan refresh_token) -> klik aksi apa pun -> apiFetch harus refresh diam-diam, request lanjut.
   g. Hapus refresh_token manual -> aksi berikutnya redirect /login.
   h. Tombol logout -> destroy session + redirect /login.

ACCEPTANCE:
- Semua langkah smoke test PASS
- bd close semua issue terkait setelah verifikasi
- git push
acceptance_criteria: lint+build hijau; 8 skenario smoke test PASS

title: Migrasi caller: login, dashboard actions, organization -> apiFetch/rawFetch
description:
Ganti semua boilerplate getAccessToken + fetch + Authorization + result.data dengan pemanggilan apiFetch/rawFetch dan signIn dari modul baru.

LANGKAH:
1. Gunakan context7 -> '/vercel/next.js' query 'server actions error handling pattern' + 'react-hook-form server action result'.
2. src/app/login/action.ts (doLogin): ganti fetch manual ke /token dengan rawFetch<LoginToken>('/token', ...). Sukses -> signIn(token). Pertahankan shape return error object lama supaya UI tidak rusak (tangkap ApiError, kembalikan { error: ... }).
3. src/app/dashboard/action.ts: ganti fetchTunkin, cekExistingTunkin, doUpload menjadi pemanggilan apiFetch satu baris (lihat shape backend untuk path & method). Hapus import getAccessToken.
4. src/action/server/organization.ts (fetchOrganization): apiFetch<...>('/organization/list').
5. src/app/dashboard/template.tsx + tempat lain yang pakai getUser(): ganti ke requireUser() dari lib/dal.ts.
6. Tidak boleh ada lagi 'Authorization: Bearer' literal di luar lib/api.ts.

ACCEPTANCE:
- grep 'Authorization' src/ hanya muncul di lib/api.ts
- grep 'getAccessToken|getUser|getSession|decodeToken|getExpToken' src/ kosong
- bun run build hijau
- Manual smoke: login, lihat dashboard, upload file -> semua bekerja
acceptance_criteria: no Auth header literal outside api.ts; build hijau; smoke login+upload OK
notes: Migrated all callers to use apiFetch, rawFetch, and requireUser. Updated login, dashboard, and organization actions. Replaced getUser with requireUser in dashboard layout. Ensured all actions return BaseResponse compatible with existing UI hooks. Cleaned up literal Authorization headers. Build and lint are now green.

title: Slim proxy.ts: optimistic gatekeeper (no network)
description:
Ubah src/proxy.ts (Next 16 middleware) menjadi gerbang murni-cookie tanpa panggilan jaringan. Refresh sekarang tanggung jawab DAL.

LANGKAH:
1. Gunakan context7 -> '/vercel/next.js' query 'middleware proxy 16 auth optimistic check' + 'edge vs node runtime'.
2. Hapus fungsi renewAccess() di proxy.ts.
3. Logika baru: baca currentSession() saja. Jika refreshToken kosong dan path bukan publicRoutes -> redirect /login. Selain itu NextResponse.next(). TIDAK ada cek isExpired di proxy (biarkan DAL/apiFetch yang refresh saat dipakai).
4. Pertahankan config.matcher persis sama.
5. Jangan ubah daftar publicRoutes.

ACCEPTANCE:
- proxy.ts tidak memanggil fetch sama sekali
- File <30 baris
- Manual smoke: buka /dashboard tanpa cookie -> redirect /login; dengan cookie valid -> tampil
acceptance_criteria: proxy.ts pure cookie check; no network; manual smoke passed
notes: Slimmed down proxy.ts to be a purely optimistic gatekeeper. Removed all network calls (renewAccess) and handled only basic session existence check. Middleware now redirects to /login only if no refreshToken is present on protected routes. Verified with lint.

title: Coordinate with BE: 409 on Probe→Upload race for /tunkin/upload
description: Known limitation surfaced during grilling of pkn (useUploadTunkin design). Window between Probe (GET /tunkin/exists/:periode returns is_exist=false) and Upload (POST /tunkin/upload) can be raced by another uploader, causing silent overwrite — opposite of the guardrail intent. Probe is caller-driven and not a security boundary, so the fix belongs on the BE side.
design: Ask BE team to return 409 (or BaseResponse with explicit error code) from POST /tunkin/upload when periode rows already exist AND the caller did not explicitly opt into overwrite. Options: (a) BE remembers nothing, FE sends overwrite=true flag in multipart when user confirmed via AlertDialog — BE rejects with 409 unless flag is set and rows already exist; (b) BE always returns 409 on existing periode regardless, FE retries with overwrite=true after confirm. Pick after BE conversation.
acceptance_criteria: Decision recorded (here or in an ADR) on which mechanism BE will adopt; FE adapter doUpload + useUploadTunkin updated to send the overwrite flag and surface 409 as reason:upload-conflict; integration verified manually.

title: Centralize ApiError → BaseResponse reshaping at the Transport seam
description: src/app/dashboard/action.ts (doUpload) and src/app/login/action.ts (doLogin) both manually catch ApiError, inspect whether .body is already a BaseResponse, and synthesise one if not. Two instances of identical reshaping; a third action will cement the duplication.
design:
Option B + B2 (discriminated union). Add safeAction(fn) adapter to src/lib/api.ts. Transport (apiFetch/rawFetch) tetap throw — reshape adalah concern client-consumed mutations, bukan transport.

Shape:
  type ActionResult<T> = { ok: true; data: T } | { ok: false; status: number; message: string; errors?: string[] };
  async function safeAction<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<ActionResult<T>>;

Critical guard: rethrow Next NEXT_REDIRECT error (use isRedirectError from next/navigation). Tanpa guard ini, redirect dari ensureFreshToken akan ditelan jadi toast "Network error" — session expiry jadi bug diam.

After landing:
- doUpload jadi 1 baris: safeAction(() => apiFetch("/tunkin/upload", {...}))
- doLogin: signIn dipindah ke dalam fn; safeAction shape errornya juga
- Hook upload-hook.ts tidak perlu lagi "throw data.errors" — cukup if (!result.ok)
- BaseResponse fake fields (timestamp, request_id: "local") dibuang — itu BE concern, FE tidak perlu bohong

Tidak fold ke apiFetch karena RSC reads butuh throw (Next error boundary), bukan shape.
acceptance_criteria: safeAction exported from src/lib/api.ts dengan signature ActionResult<T>; NEXT_REDIRECT di-rethrow (verified via test atau code review); doUpload + doLogin tidak punya try/catch reshaping; pkn upload hook switch ke if (!result.ok) pattern; tidak ada sintesis BaseResponse fake (timestamp/request_id="local") di action manapun.

title: Remove (or justify) dead click-outside handler in dashboard filter
description: src/app/dashboard/filter.tsx has a click-outside useEffect with an empty handler ('// Optional: close on outside click'). Either there is hidden filter-panel UI state the URL-as-state hook isn't covering, or it's dead code that misleads readers about how the filter is controlled.
design: If filter-panel open/closed state is intentional non-URL state: localize it with a clear comment explaining why it stays out of useTunkinFilter (the URL-as-state canonical hook). Otherwise: delete the effect and its ref.
acceptance_criteria: No empty-bodied effects in filter.tsx; filter behavior unchanged for users.

title: Consolidate InputZod/BulanZod/TahunZod/InputFileZod into one ZodField
description: src/components/form/{input-zod,bulan-zod,tahun-zod,file-zod}.tsx are four ~40–75-line Controller wrappers differing only in input variant. CONTEXT.md already flags this as a consolidation candidate. Shallow but load-bearing duplication.
acceptance_criteria:
- src/components/form/zod-field.tsx exists and exports default ZodField with discriminated variant prop ('text'|'select'|'file').
- The four old wrappers deleted; no remaining imports of InputZod/BulanZod/TahunZod/InputFileZod (grep clean).
- src/tipes/options.ts exports BULAN_OPTIONS and TAHUN_OPTIONS.
- src/app/login/login-form.tsx and src/app/dashboard/form-dialog.tsx migrated to ZodField; visual parity in both forms.
- FieldError renders on invalid state for ALL variants (including select) — this is the bug fix.
- 'hidden' inputType variant gone; phantom fileRef gone; BulanItem/TahunItem memo wrappers gone.
- bun run lint clean.

title: Bersihkan dead code: hapus lib/auth.ts renewToken, fetch-helper.ts; update CLAUDE.md
description:
Hapus kode mati setelah migrasi dan rapikan dokumen.

LANGKAH:
1. src/lib/auth.ts: hapus renewToken (logika sudah di lib/api.ts ensureFreshToken). Sisakan hanya logout() yang memanggil signOut() + redirect('/login').
2. src/lib/fetch-helper.ts: HAPUS file. Tidak ada konsumen.
3. CLAUDE.md: bagian 'Auth & request flow' -- tulis ulang singkat sesuai arsitektur baru (proxy optimistic, lib/api.ts owner HTTP, lib/session.ts owner cookie, lib/dal.ts owner page auth). Hapus klaim keliru bahwa nama 'proxy' project-specific -- itu konvensi Next 16. Bagian 'Data fetching pattern' update untuk menyebut apiFetch.
4. Jalankan: bd memories add tentang konvensi baru jika perlu.

ACCEPTANCE:
- src/lib/fetch-helper.ts tidak ada
- src/lib/auth.ts hanya berisi logout
- CLAUDE.md mencerminkan arsitektur baru
- bun run lint hijau
acceptance_criteria: fetch-helper deleted; auth.ts only logout; CLAUDE.md updated; lint hijau
notes: Deleted unused fetch-helper.ts. Pruned legacy code from lib/auth.ts. Updated CLAUDE.md to reflect the new architecture (optimistic proxy, centralized lib/api.ts, lib/session.ts rewrite, and DAL pattern). All verified with lint and build.

value: Architecture: Next 16, optimistic proxy, centralized lib/api.ts (apiFetch/rawFetch/ApiError), lib/session.ts (sync cookies/JWT), lib/dal.ts (requireUser). No more literal Authorization headers or legacy session helpers.
